title: Encapsulation Strategies
description: Analyze the differences between TypeScript's `private` keyword and ECMAScript's `#private` fields regarding visibility. Compare the runtime implications and performance characteristics of various encapsulation strategies in TypeScript.
objectives: Analyze the differences between TypeScript's `private` keyword and ECMAScript's `#private` fields regarding visibility.
Compare the runtime implications and performance characteristics of various encapsulation strategies in TypeScript.
